mapping_rationale: Universal prerequisite — date must be parsed before any calendar feature or join.
Adds city, state, type, cluster store metadata features
Left join preserves all rows; oil has no entries for weekends/holidays.
Adds holiday type, locale, transferred flag. Left join preserves non-holiday rows.
Linear interpolation fills weekend/holiday NaN gaps in dcoilwtico.
Uses a null-safe holiday cleanup so ordinary non-holiday rows stay in the data while moved-holiday labels are removed.
Full calendar block (year, month, dayofweek, quarter) is used by majority of top notebooks.
Label encoding of the family column is standard for tree-based models.
Row identifier has no predictive value.
